title: taraxacum estrelense
intro: Taraxacum estrelense, also known as the Starry Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and liver problems. The plant is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can contribute to various health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function. Taraxacum estrelense can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
